channel.title: Abdul Rafay
channel.description: Welcome to my universe, Software Engineer and Open Source enthusiast

item.title: My Love & Hate Relationship with Copilot
item.description: Explores the nuanced relationship with GitHub copilot, discussing both its benefits and drawbacks.

item.title: The Truth About No Code Tools
item.description: Explores the nuanced relationship with GitHub copilot, discussing both its benefits and drawbacks.
